Add a description or send directly...
未关联 Agent 的会话: Sessions not linked to any Agent
点击上方按钮开始新对话: Click the button above to start a new chat
当前上下文很充裕，无需压缩: Context is sufficient, no compression needed
隐藏工具调用的思考过程消息，让对话更简洁: Hide tool call thinking messages for cleaner chat
启动时预先拉取 skill 的描述信息，但会提前消耗 TOKEN: Pre-fetch skill descriptions on startup (consumes tokens early)
单次对话中 LLM 可连续调用工具的最大次数: Max consecutive tool calls per conversation
设定终端命令执行前是否需要弹窗确认: Whether to require confirmation before executing commands
在系统提示词中自动加入当前 OS、工作目录、工具版本等信息: Auto-inject OS, workspace, tool versions into system prompt
仅高危命令（删除/修改系统等）执行前弹窗确认，安装类命令直接执行: Only risky commands (delete/modify system) require confirmation
高危命令和安装类命令执行前弹窗确认，安全命令直接执行: Risky and install commands require confirmation
该会话未设置工作目录: This session has no workspace set
确定删除: Are you sure you want to delete
添加快捷输入模板，在聊天输入框底部点击按钮即可快速填入预设文本。: Add quick input templates. Click the button at the bottom of the chat input to quickly fill in preset text.
输入一段文本作为模板内容，点击即可填入输入框。: Enter text as a template, click to fill it into the input box.
点击下方按钮添加: Click the button below to add
点击「导入 ZIP」导入技能包，或手动将技能文件夹放入上述目录后点击「扫描」: Click "Import ZIP" to import skills, or manually place skill folders in the directory above and click "Scan"
请在文件管理器中手动打开:: Please open manually in file manager:
确定删除「: Are you sure you want to delete "
」？技能文件将从磁盘永久删除。: "? The skill files will be permanently deleted from disk.
您的浏览器不支持语音输入，请使用 Chrome 或 Edge: Voice input is not supported in your browser. Please use Chrome or Edge.
不支持的图片格式，仅支持 PNG / JPEG / WebP / GIF / B: Unsupported image format. Only PNG / JPEG / WebP / GIF / BMP are supported.
麦克风权限被拒绝，请重启应用后重试: Microphone permission denied. Please restart the app and try again.
未检测到语音，请重试: No speech detected, please try again.
启动语音识别失败，请检查麦克风权限: Failed to start speech recognition. Please check microphone permissions.
删除 $__name__ 分组下的所有会话？: Delete all conversations under the "$__name__" group?
该操作将永久删除 $__count__ 个会话，无法恢复。: This will permanently delete $__count__ conversations and cannot be undone.
无法在系统文件管理器中打开该路径: Unable to open path in system file manager
AI 对文件系统的访问规则如下(终端执行不在管控范围内)：: AI file system access rules (terminal execution is not restricted):
输入文件夹名（仅名称，非路径），如 node_modules: Enter folder name (name only, not path), e.g. node_modules
请输入文件夹名（如 node_modules）: Please enter a folder name (e.g. node_modules)
不包含工具调用参数和返回结果: Exclude tool call parameters and results
选择一个服务商，配置 API Key 即可开始使用: Select a provider and configure API Key to get started
输入模型 ID，回车添加: Enter model ID, press Enter to add
请输入正确的 API 地址: Please enter a valid API URL
确定要删除这个服务商吗？此操作无法撤销: Are you sure you want to delete this provider? This action cannot be undone.
Describe this Agent's role in one sentence...
介绍会出现在 Agent 列表上，建议不超过 50 字: The description appears in the Agent list, recommended under 50 characters
越低越确定，越高越有创造性（默认 0.7）: Lower = more deterministic, higher = more creative (default 0.7)
核采样阈值，越低越保守（默认 1.0）: Nucleus sampling threshold, lower = more conservative (default 1.0)
创建会话时将自动使用此模型，用户可在会话中切换: New sessions will use this model by default. Users can switch later.
设置后，该 Agent 创建的会话默认以此目录为工作区: Sessions created by this Agent will use this directory as workspace
暂未注册任何技能。请在设置页面导入技能 ZIP 包后刷新。: No skills registered. Please import a skill ZIP in Settings and refresh.
确定删除「$__name__」？$__reason__: Are you sure you want to delete "$__name__"? $__reason__
确定删除「$__name__」？技能文件将从磁盘永久删除。: Are you sure you want to delete "$__name__"? The skill files will be permanently deleted from disk.
此命令可能对系统造成破坏，请确认是否执行: This command may damage your system. Please confirm before execution.
此命令会修改系统环境或下载外部代码，请确认是否执行: This command will modify system environment or download external code. Please confirm before execution.
无法跨设备移动目录，请先手动复制内容到目标设备后删除原目录: Cannot move directory across devices. Please manually copy the contents to the target device and delete the original directory.
错误：源路径不存在 — $__path__: Error: Source path does not exist — $__path__
错误：目标路径已存在 — $__path__，请先删除或选择其他路径: Error: Destination path already exists — $__path__, please delete it first or choose another path
错误：暂不支持复制目录，请使用 move 模式移动目录，或逐个复制目录内的文件: Error: Directory copy is not supported yet. Use move mode to move the directory, or copy files individually.
💡 提示: 使用 start_line=$__line__ 读取后续内容: 💡 Tip: use start_line=$__line__ to read more
💡 提示: 文件内容未完整显示，剩余 $__remaining__ 行。使用 s: 💡 Tip: content truncated, $__remaining__ lines remaining. Use start_line=$__next__ to read more.
确认删除该消息及后续所有消息？: Delete this message and all subsequent messages?
暂无 Agent，点击上方按钮创建: No agents yet. Click the button above to create one.
命令已被用户取消: Command was cancelled by the user
命令在 $__time__ 秒后超时并被终止: Command timed out after $__time__s and was killed
你的 AI 伙伴，写文案、写代码、理思路、整理文档，都可以交给我。: Your AI partner — writing copy, coding, brainstorming, organizing documents, and more.
选择一个文件夹作为默认工作目录，AI 将在该目录下读写文件、执行命令。: Choose a folder as the default workspace where AI can read/write files and execute commands.
你也可以跳过此步骤，之后在设置中随时修改。: You can skip this step and change it later in Settings.
选择一个模型服务商并填写 API Key，即可开始对话。: Select a provider and enter your API Key to start chatting.
输入兼容 OpenAI 接口的 API 地址。: Enter an API URL compatible with the OpenAI interface.
API Key 仅存储在本地，不会上传。: API Key is stored locally and will not be uploaded.
输入你要使用的模型 ID。不确定时可点击「自动获取」尝试拉取。: Enter the model ID you want to use. Click "Auto Fetch" if unsure.
API Key 验证失败，请检查后重试: API Key validation failed. Please check and retry.
发送的图片会进行 UI 检测 + OCR + 物体检测\n提取结构化文本发给 A:
Sending images will be UI detection + OCR + object detection
Extract structured text to send to AI instead of sending raw images
Give VLM visual capabilities
Make VLM more token-efficient, but pseudo-visual analysis, no real VLM analysis intelligence
选择一个搜索引擎供应商，配置后即可在对话中使用网络搜索: Select a search provider so the AI can search the internet during conversations
此搜索引擎无需 API Key，只需填写服务地址即可: This search engine does not require an API key. Just enter the server URL.
已添加 $__name__，请配置 API Key: Added $__name__. Please configure the API Key.
添加一个搜索引擎后，AI 即可在对话中实时搜索互联网信息: Add a search engine so the AI can search the internet in real time during chats
❌ 连接失败，请检查配置: ❌ Connection failed. Please check your configuration
确定要删除这个搜索引擎吗？此操作无法撤销: Are you sure you want to delete this search engine? This action cannot be undone.
博查 AI 开放平台搜索引擎，搜索结果丰富，支持中文搜索: Bocha AI open-platform search engine with rich results and strong Chinese search support
此版本为强制更新，请升级后继续使用: This is a mandatory update. Please upgrade to continue using
建议更新至最新版本，获得更好的体验: A new version is available. Update for a better experience
暂无知识库，请先在设置中创建知识库。: No knowledge bases yet. Please create one in Settings.
导入知识库失败：$__error__: Failed to import to knowledge base: $__error__
获取知识库列表失败：$__error__: Failed to fetch knowledge base list: $__error__
请至少选择一条消息: Please select at least one message
